HattrickData:
- : unsigned Integer The team's TeamID.
: String The full name of the team.
: DateTime First date to show matches in archive from.
: DateTime Last date to show matches in archive to.
- - : unsigned Integer The globally unique identifier of the match.
- : Integer The teamID of the Home team in the match. (Negative for street teams)
: String The team name of the Home team in the match.
- : Integer The teamID of the Away team in the match. (Negative for street teams)
: String The team name of the Away team in the match.
: DateTime The start date and time (kick-off) of the match.
: MatchTypeID Integer defining the type of match.
: unsigned Integer This will be either LeagueLevelUnitId (for League), CupId (Cup, Hattrick Masters, World Cup and U-20 World Cup) or 0 for friendly and qualification
: String The name of the source system that playes the match
: MatchRuleID This will contain the rules that's in place for the ladder or tournament in question. It's provided for all matchtypes and defaults to 0 = No rules
: unsigned Integer Integer defining the id of the cup.
: unsigned Integer 1 = National/Divisional cup, 2 = Challenger cup, 3 = Consolation cup. 0 if MatchType is not 3.
: unsigned Integer In Challenger cups: 1 = Emerald (start week 2), 2 = Ruby (start week 3), 3 = Sapphire (start week 4). Always 1 for National/Divisional (main cups) and Consolation cups. 0 if MatchType is not 3.
: unsigned Integer* The current number of goals in the match for the home team. If the match is still upcoming or ongoing, this tag is not sent.
: unsigned Integer* The current number of goals in the match for the away team. If the match is still upcoming or ongoing, this tag is not sent.
